installCommand: sh -c 'if command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then dnf install -y libpq-devel pkgconf-pkg-config; elif command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then apt-get update && apt-get install -y libpq-dev pkg-config; else echo "Install libpq dev packages (dnf: libpq-devel, apt: libpq-dev)" >&2; exit 1; fi' && cd app && bun install
